tasks.subject: Task 1: Drift-free fixed substep (WS1)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add World.substep() that advances exactly one PHYS_DT substep with no accumulator, and point the headless evaluators at it so long runs are bit-identical across machines.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/blueball/world.py (step method region)
- Modify: src/blueball/ai/trainer.py (evaluate + evaluate_infinite loops)
- Test: tests/test_world_determinism.py, tests/test_ai_smoke.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- World.substep() runs exactly one substep, no accumulator change
- step() and substep() share one per-substep path (_run_one_substep)
- evaluate/evaluate_infinite use world.substep()
- evaluate_infinite bit-identical at max_steps=2000
- full suite green

**Verify:** SDL_VIDEODRIVER=dummy /home/ddgg0/projects/BlueBall/.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_world_determinism.py tests/test_ai_smoke.py -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/world.py", "src/blueball/ai/trainer.py", "tests/test_world_determinism.py", "tests/test_ai_smoke.py"], "verifyCommand": "SDL_VIDEODRIVER=dummy /home/ddgg0/projects/BlueBall/.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_world_determinism.py tests/test_ai_smoke.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["World.substep() runs exactly one substep, no accumulator change", "step() and substep() share one per-substep path", "evaluate/evaluate_infinite use world.substep()", "evaluate_infinite bit-identical at max_steps=2000", "full suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Multiprocessing.Pool integration test (WS2)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pin that the parallel evaluation path matches serial and survives pickling/reordering, so long Pool.imap runs are trustworthy.

**Files:**
- Test: tests/test_ai_smoke.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- train(infinite_seed, map_fn=Pool(2).imap) == serial best_genome (array_equal)
- Pool results reorder correctly per idx
- Pool closed + skip if workers unavailable
- full suite green

**Verify:** SDL_VIDEODRIVER=dummy /home/ddgg0/projects/BlueBall/.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_ai_smoke.py -k pool -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/test_ai_smoke.py"], "verifyCommand": "SDL_VIDEODRIVER=dummy /home/ddgg0/projects/BlueBall/.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_ai_smoke.py -k pool -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["train under Pool.imap == serial best_genome", "Pool results reorder correctly per idx", "Pool closed + skip if workers unavailable", "full suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: TrainScene Infinite Run parity + async viz-only eval (WS3)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rewrite TrainScene so the visual trainer streams the real Infinite Run course for display while an async Pool.map_async evaluates the full population for authoritative fitness — removing the -inf invisible-agent dilution and matching the headless trainer.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/blueball/ai/trainer.py (rename _INFINITE_SPAWN -> public INFINITE_SPAWN)
- Rewrite: src/blueball/scenes/train.py
- Modify: train_main.py
- Test: tests/test_ai_smoke.py (rewrite train_scene tests + _SyncPool stubs)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- TrainScene accepts exactly one of level_path/infinite_seed else ValueError
- infinite display streams via TerrainStream, n_visible live
- full pop evaluated via injectable pool map_async, gen advances on ready
- sync pool stub test confirms pop_size genomes evaluated
- train_main uses INFINITE_RUN_SEED
- full suite green

**Verify:** SDL_VIDEODRIVER=dummy /home/ddgg0/projects/BlueBall/.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_ai_smoke.py -k train_scene -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/scenes/train.py", "src/blueball/ai/trainer.py", "train_main.py", "tests/test_ai_smoke.py"], "verifyCommand": "SDL_VIDEODRIVER=dummy /home/ddgg0/projects/BlueBall/.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_ai_smoke.py -k train_scene -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["exactly one of level_path/infinite_seed else ValueError", "infinite display streams via TerrainStream, n_visible live", "full pop evaluated via injectable pool map_async, gen advances on ready", "sync pool stub test confirms pop_size genomes evaluated", "train_main uses INFINITE_RUN_SEED", "full suite green"]}
```
